title: Monster Energy Standard Tall Black Monster Ad Poster
sourceTitle: Monster Energy Standard Tall Black Monster Ad Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic Monster Energy symbiote product advertisement built around standard tall black Monster Energy aluminum can standing upright as the hero product, Monster Energy, and muscular jet-black symbiotic liquid inspired by Venom wrapping the can with oily tendrils, blade-like protrusions, micro ripples, and vein-like striations. Subject: standard tall black Monster Energy aluminum can standing upright as the hero product stands upright as the hero can; Monster Energy branding and iconic neon green Monster Energy claw logo kept clearly visible as the focal contrast mark stay sharp, readable, and visually dominant through the black symbiote interaction. Scene: dark rough textured surface with controlled haze, deep shadows, cold blue rim light, green spill from the logo, and glossy wet highlights creates a dark cinematic product stage with rough texture, haze, rim light, and wet specular highlights. Composition: Fixed dramatic low-angle hero shot, slightly Dutch-tilted, macro close range, shallow depth of field, razor focus on the logo and symbiote-contact area, with tendrils anchoring to the surface and rising around the can. Signature Elements: The source visual mechanism is the Monster Energy can being consumed, claimed, and partially fused by a living Venom-style jet-black symbiote while the green claw mark remains the focal contrast. Style: Cinematic ultra-high-end product photography fused with Venom-inspired biomechanical horror texture: dense oily gloss, elastic black tendrils, predatory motion, micro ripples, blade-like protrusions, and luxury ad sharpness. Color Palette: Fixed deep black aluminum and symbiote oil, neon Monster green, cold blue rim light, controlled green spill, dark graphite surface, and high-contrast wet highlights. Lighting: Strong cold blue rim light sculpts the glossy black tendrils, while subtle neon-green logo spill catches nearby liquid contours and deep shadows preserve premium contrast. Camera: Macro cinema lens at close range with low-angle drama, shallow depth of field, extreme surface detail, and controlled volumetric haze. Materials: Tall aluminum can, printed claw logo, oily elastic symbiote, rough textured surface, wet reflections, mist, and floating micro-particles remain physically detailed. Restrictions: Keep the can readable, preserve the Monster Energy identity, keep symbiote anatomy coherent and liquid-like, maintain dark cinematic product hierarchy, and use intentional brand text only.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
